name: crochet_hook_hint
description: Wool Crush consumable hint: one chunky turquoise crochet hook looping through a short golden yarn curl, with one large cream sparkle beside the hook tip. The hook and loop form a compact magnifier-like circle while remaining clearly a crochet tool.
prompt_extra: single centered object, bold silhouette, soft toy-like materials, no text, no actual magnifying glass, no scissors, no animal

variants.name: loop
variants.prompt_extra: larger circular yarn loop and compact hook

variants.name: hook
variants.prompt_extra: larger hook tip and simpler short yarn loop
